title: Refactor map_access_noise.ex with proper fallback strategies
prompt: Refactor ALL of MyApp.OrderFormatter from test_fixtures/map_access_noise.ex. `summary/1`: use head destructuring with a fallback head. `shipping_address/1`: use `with` + `Map.fetch/2`, returning user-friendly fallbacks. `plot_point/1`: head destructuring. Each function should eliminate `map[:key]` access entirely. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.OrderFormatter do ... end`.

must_contain: def summary(%{id: id, items: items, total: total})
def plot_point(%{x: x, y: y, z: z})

tier_rationale: Three-function synthesis. Each function needs a different refactoring approach.
